name: Bar MAZE
tagline: James Beard-nominated omakase in Kakaako — intimate counter seating where every course is theater.
parking: Street parking on Auahi St and surrounding Kakaako blocks; metered spots free after 6pm
talkStory: From Justin Park (2023 James Beard Outstanding Bartender winner, also behind the acclaimed Bar Leather Apron) and brother Tom, with Chef Ki Chung earning consecutive James Beard Best Chef nominations. Opened 2021 in Kakaako with just 16 counter seats. The seasonal tasting menu spotlights hyper-local ingredients; the cocktail pairing is meticulously matched course-by-course. Book 2-3 weeks ahead — this is one of Hawaii's hardest reservations to score.
